Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.Weight

    • Uses of Weight in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return Weight 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Weight Weight.addAndReturnNew​(double value, WeightUnit unit, WeightUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided weight value and unit and returns a new weight instance using provided unit.
      static Weight Weight.addAndReturnNew​(Weight arg1, Weight arg2, WeightUnit unit)
      Adds two weights.
      Weight Weight.addAndReturnNew​(Weight w, WeightUnit unit)
      Adds provided weight to current instance and returns a new weight.
      Weight Weight.addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, WeightUnit unit, WeightUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided weight value and unit and returns a new weight instance using provided unit.
      static Weight WeightConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Weight input, WeightUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a weight to requested output unit.
      Weight WeightFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a weight value and unit.
      Weight Weight.subtractAndReturnNew​(double value, WeightUnit unit, WeightUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided weight value and unit and returns a new weight instance using provided unit.
      static Weight Weight.subtractAndReturnNew​(Weight arg1, Weight arg2, WeightUnit unit)
      Subtracts two weights.
      Weight Weight.subtractAndReturnNew​(Weight w, WeightUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided weight from current instance and returns a new weight.
      Weight Weight.subtractAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, WeightUnit unit, WeightUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided weight value and unit and returns a new weight instance using provided unit.
      Methods in com.irurueta.units with parameters of type Weight 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Weight.add​(Weight weight)
      Adds provided weight and updates current weight.
      void Weight.add​(Weight w, Weight result)
      Adds provided weight and stores the result into provided weight.
      static void Weight.add​(Weight arg1, Weight arg2, Weight result)
      Adds two weights and stores the result into provided instance.
      static Weight Weight.addAndReturnNew​(Weight arg1, Weight arg2, WeightUnit unit)
      Adds two weights.
      Weight Weight.addAndReturnNew​(Weight w, WeightUnit unit)
      Adds provided weight to current instance and returns a new weight.

      Converts a weight to provided output weight unit.

      Converts and updates a weight to requested output unit.
      static void WeightConverter.convert​(Weight input, WeightUnit outputUnit, Weight result)
      Converts a weight to requested output unit.
      static Weight WeightConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Weight input, WeightUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a weight to requested output unit.
      void Weight.subtract​(Weight weight)
      Subtracts provided weight and updates current weight.
      void Weight.subtract​(Weight w, Weight result)
      Subtracts provided weight and stores the result into provided weight.
      static void Weight.subtract​(Weight arg1, Weight arg2, Weight result)
      Subtracts two weights and stores the result into provided instance.
      static Weight Weight.subtractAndReturnNew​(Weight arg1, Weight arg2, WeightUnit unit)
      Subtracts two weights.
      Weight Weight.subtractAndReturnNew​(Weight w, WeightUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided weight from current instance and returns a new weight.
